title: Publicly visible badattrading_ posts captured via browser without X API
text:
Nova @badattrading_ Sep 29 2025: "18 wallets" quoting Jack Duval +$217k on the month. URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1972519988113416503

Nova @badattrading_ Nov 1 2025: Always when Europeans are sleeping. URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1984515023494906335

Nova @badattrading_ Nov 2 2025: 20k followers, thank you very much everyone! Hopefully you check distro more than usual now. URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1984913554617585903

Nova @badattrading_ Oct 4 2025: i'm telling you following these insiders is really not a bad idea, i was not focused on solana today. His wallet 3bMTqjwEemHWov6yKCJ7CrjVxe99S6UwJPev8obzjo8P. URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1974528723950108875

Nova @badattrading_ Oct 17 2025: You can't win at memecoins... The best rule to win at memecoins is selling when you're in [profit]. URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1979218231853273232

Nova @badattrading_ Oct 20 2025: You should really track that wallet 76ZUBj1JLz7arTVHSRJok5oSTEqDuVBgySFMVHtzxzZc. URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1980391643535798485

Nova @badattrading_ Oct 13 2025: Wallets linked to wintermute have 20% of $Tokabu. URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1977754157600604346

Nova @badattrading_ Nov 13 2025: 50k is the new 1M mc. URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1989013560228200919

Nova @badattrading_ Aug 17 2025: Dude lost $130k on the fake $SLM scam and he is still buying. URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1957131971135475858

Nova @badattrading_ Oct 14 2025: No Wintermute cluster in $RETIRE. The CEX map (purple) looks pretty diversed. URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1977976896466854380

Nova @badattrading_ Nov 11 2025: Fact $Bangers crashed from 4.9M to 1.6M mc in just 2 minutes has nothing to do with narrative, coin was vamped/bundled from the start and deployed by a rewards farmer. URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1988162579609378993

Nova @badattrading_ Aug 13 2025: Is it just the US site? Good news for $useless holders it means the distribution is not that shady. URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1955684399879762018

Nova @badattrading_ Oct 26 2025 replying to @WhaleInsider: it's a bundled scam. URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1982498806232191042

Nova @badattrading_ Nov 5 2025: $pump / $pumpdrop note: token is hitting downward resistance, lack of momentum causing this but holders are ok so far. URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1986032403442233637

Nova @badattrading_ Sep 26 2025: holy jesus fking that's some hell of a sandwich attack, for a guy that bought $188 of the token only. URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1971479179599413682

Nova @badattrading_ Jun 1 2025: How to spot a good trending coin that could go to millies? example of $MASK. When the coin is very young you put the bollinger indicator and first check the 5 min chart until bollinger bands appear, if the chart does not tank below 50k mc... URL https://x.com/badattrading_/status/1929067742512164911
